name: Haedol Park
description: He is a typical PhD student in computer vision and generative AI, currently focusing on video content generation. He always drinks lattes, finding Americanos too dull. He enjoys attending conferences and collecting free t-shirts.

name: Melissa Swift
description: She is a devilish fashion magazine editor who wears Prada and treats her assistants like disposable coffee cups and can destroy careers with a whisper. She can explain why your cerulean sweater represents the entire fashion industry in one devastating monologue.
